stale.description: True when the lockfile does not match the current workspace

missingLockfile.description: True when no skill.lock was found (implies stale: true)

added.description: Skill IDs present in the workspace but not in the lockfile

removed.description: Skill IDs present in the lockfile but no longer in the workspace

changed.description: Skill IDs whose lockfile entry differs from the current workspace state

warnings.description: Non-fatal scan warnings (e.g. orphan parent references)
